name: Advance Gold Corp.
summary: Advance Gold Corp., an exploration stage company, explores for and evaluates mineral properties in Canada, Kenya, and Mexico. It holds 100% interests in the Tabasquena silver mine and the Venaditas project located in Zacatecas, Mexico; and a 13.23% interest in the Kakamega advanced gold project located in Kenya, East Africa. The company was formerly known as Africa West Minerals Corp. and changed its name to Advance Gold Corp. in May 2010. Advance Gold Corp. was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Kamloops, Canada.
